name: I-Morphine sulfate
description: I-opioid analgesic. Inika isiqabu kwiintlungu ezisebenzayo kodwa ibangela i-vasodilation kunye ne-hypotension--sebenzisa ngononophelo kumothuko we-hemorrhagic. I-Ketamine ikhethwa kwiindawo zokulwa. Sebenzisa imorphine kuphela kwizigulane ezizinzile kwi-hemodynamically.
dose: 2-4 mg IV/IO q4h PRN. Titrate ukuya kwisiphumo. I-IM: 5-10 mg q4h PRN.
warnings: Ibangela i-vasodilation -- inokwenza mandundu ukothuka ukopha. Vavanya iBP ngaphambi nasemva.

pediatric.dose: 0.05-0.1 mg / kg IV q2-4h PRN. Ubukhulu bedosi enye 2mg IV kumntwana opioid-naive.
pediatric.note: Libeke iliso elibukhali izinga lokuphefumla. Iintsana zinovakalelo kakhulu.

obstetric.note: Unqumla i-placenta. Ukudakumba komntwana osandul’ ukuphefumla kunokwenzeka ukuba kunikwe kwiiyure ezi-2-4 zokubeleka. Yiba naloxone elungele usana olusanda kuzalwa.

source: JTS CPG: Acute Pain Management / PHTLS
